subcodes.first_line: Upon thee be the salutations of God while the stars shine and the celestial birds sing. In brief, though confined in the mountain-prison, we harbour no complaint against the decree of God; the lion feeleth no shame in its chains [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. علیک سلام الله ما لاح کوکب و ما تغرد و طیر العماء و دف مجمل القول فی سجن الجبل نیست ما را از قضای حق گله عار ناید شیر را از سلسله
subcodes.subjects: @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa], @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @degrees of faith; certitude
